nasb.text: Lift up a signal against the walls of Babylon; Post a strong guard, Station sentries, Place men in ambush! For the Lord has both purposed and performed What He spoke concerning the inhabitants of Babylon.

esv.text: “Set up a standard against the walls of Babylon; make the watch strong; set up watchmen; prepare the ambushes; for the Lord has both planned and done what he spoke concerning the inhabitants of Babylon.

cnv.text: 你們要豎起旗幟，攻擊巴比倫的城牆， 並要加強防衛，設立防哨，布下埋伏； 因為耶和華不但定意， 也必作成他攻擊巴比倫居民的話。

ccb.text: 竖起旗帜， 攻打巴比伦的城墙； 要加强防卫， 派人巡逻，设下埋伏。 因为耶和华言出必行， 一定要惩罚巴比伦人。
